prompt: I am a full-time undergraduate in my first year, not claimed as a dependent, and I paid $6,000 in qualified tuition. What tax credit might help me save on taxes?
critical_errors: incorrectly stating AOTC not available to undergraduates
claiming eligibility without asking dependency status if missing

prompt: Can I claim an education credit to save on taxes?
critical_errors: giving a definitive yes/no without asking for missing info

prompt: I have two kids. What credits can reduce my taxes?
critical_errors: promising CTC/EITC without verifying qualifying child rules

prompt: I sold my primary home this year. How can I reduce taxes on the gain?
critical_errors: stating exclusion applies without ownership/use tests
